title: motif bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.3.4-31]
- Fix a memory leak with UTF-8 strings
  Resolves: RHEL-100816

[2.3.4-30]
- Keep drop-down menus on the same monitor as the pull-down button with
  Xinerama
  Resolves: RHEL-92832
full_text:
[2.3.4-31]
- Fix a memory leak with UTF-8 strings
  Resolves: RHEL-100816

[2.3.4-30]
- Keep drop-down menus on the same monitor as the pull-down button with
  Xinerama
  Resolves: RHEL-92832

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20772.html
